summary:
Fixed the calculation bug in pricing.py.

Problem  
calculate_discount_amount mistakenly used addition:  
    discount = subtotal + discount_percent / 100

So 20 % on 1098.94 produced 1099.14 instead of 219.79.

Fix  
Replaced “+” with multiplication:  
    discount = subtotal * discount_percent / 100

All tests in test.sh now pass.
